final_prompt.prompt:
Create a wide-format editorial documentary photograph for a 微博 news/trending post.

Style/medium: needs a "新闻纪实" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Magnum Photos street documentary tradition, 1990s–2000s 新华社 photojournalism visual language, high-end mobile photojournalism in the spirit of World Press Photo winners; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal wide-frame with generous negative space on left or upper zone for text overlay; sharp foreground-to-background depth
Subject: must include a city skyline at dusk with neon lights gradually illuminating, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk cityscape — golden-hour sun low on horizon, neon signs beginning to glow, real street-level presence
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic high-contrast dusk atmosphere — golden backlight from setting sun clashing with emerging neon glow; cinematic tension between warmth and cool city light — exact light balance is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-cool contrast palette — deep amber and orange sunset tones against emerging blue-purple neon and urban shadow — exact palette execution is yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution texture quality — crisp detail in glass reflections, wet pavement, fabric of passersby — exact rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, bold headline, prominent position); "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtitle, secondary size); "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal aspect ratio; all three text elements must be legible against the image; layout must read as a real 微博 trending-post hero image
Avoid: studio lighting, artificial-looking CGI render, cluttered composition that obscures text zones, overly saturated HDR processing
